subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! That which ye sent hath attained unto My presence and I have given ear unto it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیاء الله قد فاز ما ارسلتموه بحضوری و اصغائی
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @naming of children; of individuals, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @praise and encouragement
